query:
-- Check for duplicate rows per AE/year/month
SELECT aeId, year, month, COUNT(*) as row_count, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(dialsTotal) as dials_values,
       GROUP_CONCAT(arrUsd) as arr_values
FROM monthly_metrics 
WHERE aeId = 30002
GROUP BY aeId, year, month
ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC;
